nodes.context: Mexican American gang from Wilmington, Los Angeles, California, controlled by the Mexican Mafia.
Prison gang that controls Wilmas 13 and leads its gangs via contraband electronic devices.
Sub-gang of Wilmas 13; low-level members are rivals, top-level report to Mexican Mafia.

edges.evidence_quote: Wilmas 13 (W13) is a Mexican American gang from Wilmington, Los Angeles , California that is controlled by the Mexican Mafia.
edges.context: Wilmas 13 is controlled by the Mexican Mafia.

edges.evidence_quote: It has four sub-gangs, Eastside Wilmas, Westside Wilmas, Northside Wilmas, IMG Insane MEXICAN Gang
edges.context: Eastside Wilmas is a sub-gang of Wilmas 13.
